method: inline curl + node (no UI; backend API only)
agent_used: inline (sub-agent dispatch hit org usage limit)
notes: Original bug reported on vcptcore-demo.govirto.com; verified on vcst-qa.govirto.com.
?listIds=<guid>: was 500 NRE -> now 204 + actually deletes (3/3 cycles).
GET /menu/{listId} after successful delete: was shell object -> now null body (4 bytes).
?ids= and ?ids[]=: was silent 204 no-op -> now 400 'Query parameter listIds is required.'
DELETE with no query params now returns the same 400 envelope (graceful guard).
DELETE works for lists with non-empty menuLinks.
?listIds=<non-existent-guid> returns 204 no-op (acceptable idempotent behavior, not a regression).
All test data cleaned up - 0 leaked QAtest-VCST4962-* lists remain.
